response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js/React work at Optilyz and current AI-agent/MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq matching the AI agent development requirement. Strong polyglot background (TS, Java, C/C++, DLang, Python-adjacent), TDD/CI-CD craftsmanship culture, and architecture experience across web/mobile/embedded. Gaps: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mentions, and Kotlin is absent (Java present). Overall a strong fit worth interviewing to validate Nest.js/Vitest depth.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS
Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience at re:cinq
Strong craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, trunk-based dev, CI/CD, code katas
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
Vitest not mentioned (Jest/other testing frameworks not explicitly cited either)
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is older (robotic arms era)

key_factors.factor: AI agent / MCP experience matches required skill
